panels.description: Latest daily active users count

targets.rawSql: SELECT daily_active_users AS "Daily Active Users" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY day DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

panels.title: Daily Active Users

panels.description: Code acceptance rate across the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Code Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Total lines of code added by Copilot in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(loc_added_sum) AS "Lines Added" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Lines of Code Added

panels.description: Total pull requests created by Copilot in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(pr_total_created_by_copilot) AS "PRs by Copilot" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: PRs Created by Copilot

panels.description: Latest weekly active users count

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_login) AS "Weekly Active Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 DAY' AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Weekly Active Users (WAU)

panels.description: Latest monthly active users count

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_login) AS "Monthly Active Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '28 DAY' AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Monthly Active Users (MAU)

panels.description: Total pull requests reviewed by Copilot in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(pr_total_reviewed_by_copilot) AS "PRs Reviewed by Copilot" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: PRs Reviewed by Copilot

panels.description: Total user-initiated interactions in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) AS "User-Initiated Interactions" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: User-Initiated Interactions

panels.description: Daily and monthly active users over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, daily_active_users AS "Daily Active", monthly_active_users AS "Monthly Active" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: Active Users Over Time

panels.description: Code suggestions generated vs accepted over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, code_generation_activity_count AS "Suggestions", code_acceptance_activity_count AS "Acceptances" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: Code Suggestions & Acceptances

panels.description: Lines of code suggested to add versus lines added over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, loc_suggested_to_add_sum AS "LOC Suggested", loc_added_sum AS "LOC Added" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: LOC Suggested vs LOC Added Over Time

panels.description: Pull request activity over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, pr_total_created AS "PRs Created", pr_total_created_by_copilot AS "PRs Created by Copilot", pr_total_reviewed AS "PRs Reviewed" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: PR Activity Over Time

panels.description: Weekly user-initiated interactions by top Copilot features

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(day - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM day) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AS DATE) AS time, CASE WHEN feature IN (SELECT feature FROM (SELECT feature FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "feature" HAVING SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 4) AS top_features) THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(feature, 'chat_panel_', ''), '_mode', '') ELSE 'Other' END AS metric, SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) AS value FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "time", "metric" ORDER BY time NULLS FIRST

panels.title: Feature Mix Over Time

panels.description: Weekly user-initiated interactions by top IDEs (Top 5 + Other)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(day - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM day) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AS DATE) AS time, CASE WHEN ide IN (SELECT ide FROM (SELECT ide FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_ide WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "ide" HAVING SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 4) AS top_ides) THEN ide ELSE 'Other' END AS metric, SUM(user_initiated_interaction_count) AS value FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_ide WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "time", "metric" ORDER BY time NULLS FIRST

panels.title: IDE Adoption Over Time

panels.description: Top languages ranked by code acceptance rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT language AS "Language", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_language_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "language" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) DESC NULLS LAST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top Languages by Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Top models ranked by code acceptance rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT model AS "Model", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_model_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "model" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) DESC NULLS LAST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Models by Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Matrix-style breakdown of suggestions and acceptances by language and feature

targets.rawSql: SELECT language AS "Language", feature AS "Feature", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_language_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "language", "feature" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY language NULLS FIRST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

panels.title: Feature x Language Matrix

panels.description: Count of distinct users active in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_login) AS "Unique Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Unique Users (Period)

panels.description: Users who have used Copilot agent mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_login) AS "Agent Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' AND used_agent = 1

panels.title: Agent Mode Adopters

panels.description: Users who have used Copilot chat

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_login) AS "Chat Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' AND used_chat = 1

panels.title: Chat Adopters

panels.description: Percentage of seats with recorded activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT last_activity_at IS NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS "Utilization %" FROM _tool_copilot_seats WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}')

panels.title: Seat Utilization

panels.description: Daily acceptance rate trend computed as acceptances divided by suggestions

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, CAST(code_acceptance_activity_count AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(code_generation_activity_count, 0), 0) AS "Acceptance Rate" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: Overall Acceptance Rate Trend

panels.description: Daily LOC yield trend computed as added LOC divided by suggested LOC

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, ROUND(CAST(loc_added_sum AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(loc_suggested_to_add_sum, 0), 0), 2) AS "LOC Yield" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: LOC Yield Trend

panels.description: Acceptance ratio by Copilot feature

targets.rawSql: SELECT feature AS "Feature", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "feature" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) DESC NULLS LAST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Acceptance Rate by Feature

panels.description: Acceptance ratio by programming language

targets.rawSql: SELECT language AS "Language", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_language_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "language" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) DESC NULLS LAST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Acceptance Rate by Language

panels.description: Acceptance ratio by model

targets.rawSql: SELECT model AS "Model", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "Suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "Acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "Acceptance Rate %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_model_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "model" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) DESC NULLS LAST, SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Acceptance Rate by Model

panels.description: Top users ranked by code generation activity in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT user_login AS "user_login", SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS "suggestions", SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS "acceptances", ROUND(CAST(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 1) AS "acceptance %" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "user_login" HAVING SUM(code_generation_activity_count) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(code_generation_activity_count) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Users by Code Generations

panels.description: Daily trend of distinct users engaging with agent mode versus chat

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN used_agent = 1 THEN user_login END) AS "Agent Users", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN used_chat = 1 THEN user_login END) AS "Chat Users" FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY "day" ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: Agent Users vs Chat Users Trend

panels.description: First-seen daily trend of users becoming active for the first time

targets.rawSql: SELECT first_day AS time, COUNT(*) AS "New Active Users" FROM (SELECT user_login, MIN(day) AS first_day FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' GROUP BY user_login) AS first_seen WHERE $__timeFilter(first_day) GROUP BY first_day ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST

panels.title: New Active Users per Day

panels.description: Distribution of seat activity by last recorded editor

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(last_activity_editor, ''), 'unknown') AS "Editor", COUNT(*) AS "Seats" FROM _tool_copilot_seats WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND ('${scope_id}' = '' OR organization = '${scope_id}' OR organization = '') GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(last_activity_editor, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Seat Activity by Editor

panels.description: Total, active (last 30 days), and inactive seats for the selected scope

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total_seats", SUM(CASE WHEN NOT last_activity_at IS NULL AND last_activity_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 DAY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "active_seats", SUM(CASE WHEN last_activity_at IS NULL OR last_activity_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 DAY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "inactive_seats" FROM _tool_copilot_seats WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND ('${scope_id}' = '' OR organization = '${scope_id}' OR organization = '')

panels.title: Seats Summary

panels.description: Seats with no activity or activity older than 30 days

targets.rawSql: SELECT user_login AS "user_login", last_activity_at AS "last_activity_at", plan_type AS "plan_type" FROM _tool_copilot_seats WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND ('${scope_id}' = '' OR organization = '${scope_id}' OR organization = '') AND (last_activity_at IS NULL OR last_activity_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 DAY') ORDER BY last_activity_at IS NULL DESC NULLS LAST, last_activity_at ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 100

panels.title: Inactive Seats

panels.description: Latest available day in enterprise-level Copilot metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - MAX(day)))/86400), 9999) AS "Days Since Latest Data" FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Data Freshness

panels.description: Share of generated suggestions tied to unknown model/feature taxonomy

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(model, '')) = 'unknown' OR LOWER(COALESCE(feature, '')) LIKE '%unknown%' THEN code_generation_activity_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 0), 2) AS "Unknown Taxonomy %" FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_model_feature WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Unknown Taxonomy Share

panels.description: Row counts for core Copilot metrics tables

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT '_tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' UNION ALL SELECT '_tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' UNION ALL SELECT '_tool_copilot_metrics_by_feature' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_feature WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' UNION ALL SELECT '_tool_copilot_metrics_by_model_feature' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM _tool_copilot_metrics_by_model_feature WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND scope_id = '${scope_id}' UNION ALL SELECT '_tool_copilot_seats' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM _tool_copilot_seats WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') AND ('${scope_id}' = '' OR organization = '${scope_id}' OR organization = '')) AS data_volume ORDER BY row_count DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Data Volume by Table

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST
list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC NULLS LAST

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT id AS scope_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST
list.label: Scope ID
list.name: scope_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT id AS scope_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE ('${connection_id}' = '' OR connection_id::text = '${connection_id}') ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST
